ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "roll_number" TEXT /* Roll number assigned to the student */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Unique registration number of the student */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch the student is enrolled in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the address belongs to */,
  "address1" TEXT /* Primary address line */,
  "address2" TEXT /* Secondary address line */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., home, campus) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the address was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the address was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "branch_code" TEXT /* Code of the branch */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the branch belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the branch */,
  "head_of_branch" TEXT /* Name of the head of the branch */,
  "branch_email" TEXT /* Email address of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_code" TEXT /* Code of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch the course belongs to */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "course_format" TEXT /* Format of the course (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "course_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in weeks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the student is enrolled */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year in which the student is enrolled */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date the student dropped the course (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the faculty member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the faculty member (e.g., Professor, Lecturer) */,
  "date_of_joining" TEXT /* Date of joining the institution */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Highest qualification of the faculty member */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_faculty" (
  "course_faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty assignment to a course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the faculty member is assigned to */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member assigned to the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the faculty member is assigned */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year in which the faculty member is assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_faculty_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_faculty_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, faculty, student) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, faculty, student) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_academic_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic history record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course was taken */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year in which the course was taken */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_academic_history_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_academic_history_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_contact" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., emergency contact, parent contact) */,
  "contact_value" TEXT /* Value of the contact (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the contact was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the contact was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_contact_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_code" TEXT /* Code of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course requirement */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the requirement */,
  "requirement_description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of the requirement (e.g., prerequisite, co-requisite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_requirements_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_courses" (
  "student_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student-course record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the student is enrolled */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year in which the student is enrolled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the grade was received */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year in which the grade was received */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scholarships" (
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scholarship record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who received the scholarship */,
  "scholarship_name" TEXT /* Name of the scholarship */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the scholarship was awarded */,
  "award_amount" REAL /* Amount of the scholarship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scholarship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scholarships_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
